page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool for assessing the accuracy of assembled haplotypes. Editting functions such as breaking erroneous haplotype segments into smaller segments or concatenating haplotype segments are also possible.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool for assessing the accuracy of assembled haplotypes. Editting functions such as breaking erroneous haplotype segments into smaller segments or concatenating haplotype segments are also possible.
